name: decision-layer
description: Govern agentic work with decision contracts, bounded command wrappers, and auditable traces.

interface.shortDescription: Add a governed decision layer to any AI agent in one command.
interface.longDescription: Decision Layer packages a Codex skill, MCP server, and CLI for creating decision contracts, wrapping commands in bounded agentic loops, and emitting auditable traces.
defaultPrompt: Govern this task with Decision Layer.
Create a decision contract before executing.
Wrap this command with a bounded trace.
